text:
is a collaboration flight simulator type attraction at in Fuji-Q Highland, Japan. It started on 18 July 2020 for a limited time. It is based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Overview

This is Japan's first type of attraction where a huge screen with a diameter of about 20 meters shows an image of flying over Mt. Fuji, and a seat for 10 people moves accordingly. As it says, "Experience Mt. Fuji with all five senses," the wind always blows during flight, and mist is sprayed when the lake surface is approaching or flying in the fog. There is a mechanism such as appearing. The video while riding starts from the sky above Tokyo, starting with Aokigahara Jukai around Mt. Fuji, famous places such as Lake Yamanaka and Lake Kawaguchi, Shibazakura and Mt. You can enjoy the images of Mt. Fuji in each season, such as Mt. Fuji and Mt. Fuji in winter with snow. https://www.bloges.wiki/wiki/ja/%E5%AF%8C%E5%A3%AB%E9%A3%9B%E8%A1%8C%E7%A4%BE 

The ride has a duration of 6 minutes and has capacity for 40 people. https://www.fujiq.jp/en/attraction/evangelion_the_flight.html 

History

The passengers boarded the latest passenger plane "Otsuru N223" piloted by Mari Makinami Illustrious and made a scenic flight of Mt. Fuji under the control of NERV Fuj-Q Branch, but it was attacked by a Angel and was protected by the three Evangelions.
